description: Prompt registry for DB Agent local workflows. The app loads metadata from the registry and prompt text through local API endpoints.

prompts.name: Policy Generation Agent
prompts.purpose: Master policy-generation standard for turning stored templates into company-specific, context-aware, audit-ready policies.

prompts.name: Context Analyzer
prompts.purpose: Stage 1 analysis of company context, risk profile, maturity expectations, and critical context signals before artifact generation.

prompts.name: Control Strategy Engine
prompts.purpose: Stage 2 selection of applicable control themes and company-scaled operational expectations.

prompts.name: Output Generator
prompts.purpose: Stage 3 artifact-generation prompt focused on narrative, differentiated, company-specific output quality.

prompts.name: Policy QA Agent
prompts.purpose: Validate generated policies for enforceability, placeholders, mapping quality, and policy QA checks.

prompts.name: Risk QA Agent
prompts.purpose: Validate risk record quality, scoring consistency, and treatment logic.

prompts.name: Vendor QA Agent
prompts.purpose: Validate vendor assessment completeness, criticality, and evidence consistency.

prompts.name: Risk Management Assistant
prompts.purpose: Primary assessment prompt for structured risk assessment generation.

prompts.name: Vendor Risk Assessment Agent
prompts.purpose: Primary assessment prompt for vendor risk classification and treatment planning.
